notes: Browsers outside the Browserslist ranges are unsupported.

scripts.audit:all: pnpm run audit:cleanup && pnpm run audit:stats:strict && pnpm run audit:policy && pnpm run audit:security
scripts.audit:ast-grep: pnpm exec ast-grep scan --config config/ast-grep/sgconfig.yml --report-style short .
scripts.audit:cleanup: pnpm run audit:ast-grep && pnpm run audit:unused:zero && pnpm run audit:dup:zero
scripts.audit:unused: timeout ${TEST_TIMEOUT:-120}s ./tools/env.sh env NODE_OPTIONS=--import=tsx pnpm exec knip -c knip.jsonc --no-progress --max-issues 25
scripts.audit:unused:zero: timeout ${TEST_TIMEOUT:-120}s ./tools/env.sh env NODE_OPTIONS=--import=tsx pnpm exec knip -c knip.jsonc --no-progress --max-issues 0
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:collab
scripts.check:full: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:unit:full && pnpm run test:collab:full
scripts.lint: cross-env CI=1 pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint:code && pnpm run lint:css && pnpm run lint:md
scripts.lint:code:watch:raw: chokidar "**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,mts,cts,mjs,cjs}" --initial -i "**/{node_modules,data,.git}/**" -d 200 -c "cross-env ESLINT_CACHE_LOCATION=data/cache/lint-code-watch pnpm run lint:code && echo LINT_OK || { echo LINT_FAIL; exit 1; }"
scripts.lint:css: timeout ${TEST_TIMEOUT:-120}s pnpm run lint:css:stylelint && timeout ${TEST_TIMEOUT:-120}s pnpm run lint:css:syntax
scripts.preview: pnpm run build && concurrently "pnpm run preview:web" "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:collab"
scripts.verify:ci: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --lockfile-only && pnpm run check:full && pnpm run test:e2e:all && pnpm run audit:all
scripts.test:collab: cross-env NODE_ENV=test ./tools/env.sh timeout ${TEST_TIMEOUT:-120}s pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/collab/smoke.collab.spec.tsx tests/unit/collab --changed --passWithNoTests
scripts.test:collab:full: cross-env NODE_ENV=test ./tools/env.sh timeout ${TEST_TIMEOUT:-120}s pnpm exec vitest run
scripts.test:collab:repeat: sh -c 'for i in $(seq 1 20); do echo "===== collab run $i/20 ====="; pnpm run test:collab:full || exit 1; done'
scripts.test:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=test REMDO_VALIDATE_MAIN_DOC=1 ./tools/env.sh pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/collab/main-doc-schema.collab.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:all: pnpm run test:e2e:dev && pnpm run test:e2e:docker
scripts.test:e2e:repeat: sh -c 'for i in $(seq 1 20); do echo "===== e2e run $i/20 ====="; pnpm run test:e2e || exit 1; done'
scripts.test:e2e:watch: ./tools/env.sh cross-env PWTEST_WATCH=1 pnpm exec playwright test
scripts.test:perf:bench: cross-env NODE_ENV=test COLLAB_ENABLED=false ./tools/env.sh timeout ${TEST_TIMEOUT:-240}s pnpm exec vitest bench -c vitest.bench.perf.config.mts --run
scripts.test:perf:bench:8x5: cross-env PERF_WORKLOAD=8x5 TEST_TIMEOUT=900 pnpm run test:perf:bench
scripts.test:unit: cross-env NODE_ENV=test COLLAB_ENABLED=false ./tools/env.sh timeout ${TEST_TIMEOUT:-120}s pnpm exec vitest run --changed --passWithNoTests
scripts.test:unit:full: cross-env NODE_ENV=test COLLAB_ENABLED=false ./tools/env.sh timeout ${TEST_TIMEOUT:-120}s pnpm exec vitest run
scripts.test:unit:coverage: cross-env NODE_ENV=test COLLAB_ENABLED=false ./tools/env.sh timeout ${TEST_TIMEOUT:-120}s pnpm exec vitest run --coverage
scripts.test:unit:watch: cross-env NODE_ENV=test COLLAB_ENABLED=false ./tools/env.sh pnpm exec vitest --watch --ui
scripts.typecheck:tests: timeout ${TEST_TIMEOUT:-120}s pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json --pretty false
